scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/generate-agent-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-locale-pages.mjs && node scripts/localize-agent-ux.mjs && node scripts/generate-global-language-pages.cjs && node scripts/localize-global-page-copy.cjs && node scripts/i18n-translate-visible-copy.cjs && node scripts/localize-global-page-identity.cjs && node scripts/localize-marketing-content.cjs && node scripts/polish-trust-page-readability.cjs && node scripts/enforce-url-locale-controller.cjs && node scripts/final-i18n-page-polish.cjs && node scripts/inject-fixed-backtop.cjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run check:global-language && npm run check:localized-copy && npm run audit:i18n-visible && npm run check:url-locale
scripts.check:e2e: npm run lint && npm run test:run && playwright test
scripts.check:full: npm run lint && npm run test:run && playwright test && npm run lhci
scripts.qa:all: npm run build && npm run qa:static && npm run qa:site
scripts.qa:site: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright-static.cjs tests/e2e/full-site-qa.spec.ts
scripts.qa:backtop: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright-static.cjs tests/e2e/back-to-top.spec.ts
scripts.ci:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright-static.cjs tests/e2e/full-site-qa.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --reporter=line
